MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-08-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-09-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action Of Minor
Off Calendar Jan-29-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Jeffrey Scott, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Lindsey Pitt, mother and guardian ad Litem for minor Freya Sweeney.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $5,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $1,000 payable to Jeffrey Scott LLP.
A net balance of $4,000.00 to be deposited into a blocked account at New Resouce Bank 405 Howard Street, Ste. 105 San Francisco, CA 94105, until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
